examples: I am not the simple washerwoman I seem to be!
He heard the gentlemen call out warningly, "Be careful, washerwoman!"
They looked at me very proud and stiff and haughty, and said, "Go away, washerwoman!"
Popular treatments of the minimum wage point to Wanda Washerwoman and declare the policy a success because she now earns higher wages than she used to.
Even if we can point at Wanda Washerwoman and say that she has higher wages, Helen Housekeeper and David Dishwasher might be out of a job.
